mapper.select: select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_replan_log where date(create_time) = current_date()
select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_replan_log where fallback_only = 1

select avg( case when original_total_minutes <= 0 then 0 when available_minutes >= original_total_minutes then 0 else (original_total_minutes - available_minutes) * 100.0 / original_total_minutes end ) from ai_growth_coach_replan_log
